transcript:
Speaker A (Supervisor): ये क्या है? तीन दिन हो गए, अभी तक काम खत्म नहीं हुआ। तो इसका क्या मतलब है? तुम लोग टाइम पास कर रहे हो क्या? [What is this? It's been three days, the work is still not finished. What does this mean? Are you guys wasting time?]
Speaker B (Worker): Sir, the delay is not from our side. We completed the brickwork yesterday itself. We are waiting for the cement supply.
Speaker A: अरे... तुम इतनी अच्छी इंग्लिश कैसे बोल रहे हो? [Hey... how are you speaking such good English?]
Speaker B: MySivi, sir.
Speaker A: MySivi मतलब? [What does MySivi mean?]
Speaker B: सर, इस ऐप में जो AI टीचर है, वो स्टेप-बाय-स्टेप प्रोसेस के थ्रू हिंदी से ही इंग्लिश सिखाता है। डेली 15-20 मिनट्स प्रैक्टिस करने से ही काफी है। जस्ट 30 डेज में मेरी इंग्लिश बहुत इम्प्रूव हो गई। [Sir, the AI teacher in this app teaches English from Hindi through a step-by-step process. Just practicing 15-20 minutes daily is enough. In just 30 days, my English improved a lot.]
Speaker A: इतनी कोचिंग है तो फीस ज्यादा होगी ना? [With this much coaching, the fees must be high, right?]
Speaker B: एक कप चाय की कीमत से भी कम। सिर्फ ₹1 में फुल ऐप एक्सेस मिल जाता है। [Less than the price of a cup of tea. You get full app access for just ₹1.]
Speaker A: वेरी गुड! मैं भी अपने बेटे को ये ऐप इंस्टॉल करने के लिए कहूँगा। [Very good! I will also tell my son to install this app.]
Speaker B: Sure, sir. Work will be completed on time. आप भी MySivi ऐप अभी इंस्टॉल करके इंग्लिश सीखना शुरू कीजिए। [Sure, sir. Work will be completed on time. You too install the MySivi app now and start learning English.]
on_screen_text:
YEH KYA HAI [What is this]
ABHI [Now]
KHATAM NAHI HUA [Not finished]
THE DELAY IS NOT
THE BRICKWORK
YESTERDAY ITSELF
MYSIVI
PROCESS KE [Through process]
SIKHATA [Teaches]
DAILY
JUST 30
30 Days
SURE SIR
AAP BHI [You too]
APP ABHI INSTALL [Install app now]
SEEKHNA [Learning]
MySivi Premium
3 days of Premium benefits for ₹1
summary: A construction supervisor is shocked when a worker explains a project delay in fluent English. The worker credits his fluency to the MySivi app, which teaches English from Hindi for just ₹1. The supervisor decides to download it for his son, and the worker invites viewers to do the same.
